subject: Sports
title: The English Premier League
description: Learn The English Premier League in one minute.

hook.text: The most-watched football league on Earth began as a TV deal in 1992. It changed everything.

buildup.text: England's top clubs broke away from the Football League to negotiate their own television contracts.

discovery.text: Massive broadcast money attracted the world's best players and managers to English football.

twist.text: Leicester City won the league in 2016 at 5000-to-1 odds—the greatest underdog story in sports history.

climax.text: The Premier League now broadcasts to 900 million homes in 189 countries.

punchline.text: A TV deal created the world's most-watched sporting competition.

quiz.question: When was the English Premier League founded?
